landing.text:
Secure, customizable & reliable WebRTC Video Calls| Whereby
Products
Pricing
Developers
Resources
Log in
Sign up
Secure video calls. Zero hassle
European owned and privacy-first by design, Whereby delivers reliable, user-friendly video calling for individuals, teams and enterprise platforms.
Get started
Trusted by leading companies like
Video calls for every use case
Product select
meetings
For individuals and teams
Instant video calls
Permanent room links
Essential features
Basic customization
Explore Meetings
<> embedded
For product builders
API integration & SDK tooling
Programmatic room creation
Extensive features
Advanced customization
Explore Embedded
"Seeing 90% of our video calls rated 4 or 5 stars for quality shows us how Whereby has proven to be a dependable part of the telehealth experience for our customers and the people they serve"
Katrina Baxter-Moore
Senior Product Manager
Whereby for
Telehealth
Connecting practitioners & patients anywhere, anytime.
Learn more
Whereby for
eLearning
Engaging virtual classroom experiences for teachers, coaches and their students.
Learn more
Why  Whereby?
Private & secure
Privacy, confidentiality and security are very important to us. Built in Europe, our products are GDPR and HIPAA compliant, and ISO 27001 certified.
Reliable & scalable
Our infrastructure is scalable and offers a consistently high quality video call experience, including in low bandwidth scenarios and on mobile devices.
Unrivaled support
From our developer docs to our dedicated Success team, we’re here to help. At no extra cost.
User-friendly
Our UI is built with human experience in mind to reduce tech fatigue and increase engagement through intuitive design and straight-forward usability.
Powerful features ready to go
Screen sharing
File sharing
Chat
Transcriptions
Virtual whiteboard
Custom branding
Explore features
Explore our customer stories
How DrDoctor is powering hybrid healthcare for the NHS
Read the story
How Oh My Mood is Boosting Therapist Job Satisfaction
Read the story
Why our API is trusted by leading Telehealth platforms
Read the story

Secure, Customizable and Reliable WebRTC Video Calls| Whereby
Whereby: Secure video calls. Zero hassle

analysis.name: Whereby
analysis.value_proposition: European-owned, privacy-first WebRTC video calling for individuals, teams, and platforms that need embedded video via API/SDK.
analysis.target_segment: SMB + dev (dual product: Meetings for teams, Embedded for product builders)
analysis.ideal_customer: Telehealth, eLearning, and platform builders needing GDPR/HIPAA-compliant embeddable video

features.name: instant video calls
features.description: Start video calls immediately without downloads or installs

features.name: permanent room links
features.description: Persistent room URLs that stay the same across sessions

features.name: custom branding
features.description: Customize video call UI with brand colors, logos, and styling

features.name: screen sharing
features.description: Share screen during calls

features.name: file sharing
features.description: Share files in-call between participants

features.name: in-call chat
features.description: Text chat during video calls

features.name: transcription
features.description: Automatic transcription of video calls

features.name: live captions
features.description: Real-time captions during meetings

features.name: virtual whiteboard
features.description: Collaborative whiteboard during calls

features.name: recording
features.description: Record video calls for later playback

features.name: live streaming
features.description: Stream meetings via RTMP to external platforms

features.name: dial-in
features.description: Join meetings via phone dial-in

features.name: breakout rooms
features.description: Split meeting participants into smaller groups

features.name: waiting rooms
features.description: Hold participants in waiting room before admission

features.name: meeting roles and permissions
features.description: Configure user roles and per-meeting permissions

features.name: assistants
features.description: AI/programmatic assistants that can join meetings

features.name: camera effects
features.description: Background blur and camera visual effects

features.name: audio denoiser
features.description: Background noise suppression during calls

features.name: quality insights
features.description: Call quality analytics and diagnostics

features.name: usage tracking
features.description: Track customer/participant usage across rooms

features.name: rest api
features.description: REST API for programmatic room creation and management

features.name: programmatic room creation
features.description: Create video rooms via API

features.name: web component sdk
features.description: Pre-built UI web component for embedding video

features.name: react browser sdk
features.description: React SDK for building custom video UI

features.name: react native sdk
features.description: SDK for embedding video in React Native apps

features.name: ios sdk
features.description: Native iOS SDK for mobile video integration

features.name: android sdk
features.description: Native Android SDK for mobile video integration

features.name: flutter sdk
features.description: Flutter integration for cross-platform mobile video

features.name: core sdk
features.description: Low-level SDK for custom video experiences

features.name: webhooks
features.description: Event webhooks for meeting lifecycle notifications

features.name: s3 storage integration
features.description: Secure authentication for storing recordings in customer S3

features.name: gdpr compliance
features.description: European-built platform compliant with GDPR
features.evidence_quote: our products are GDPR and HIPAA compliant

features.name: hipaa compliance
features.description: HIPAA-compliant configuration for telehealth use cases

features.name: iso 27001 certification
features.description: ISO 27001 certified security posture

features.name: low bandwidth optimization
features.description: Consistent call quality on low bandwidth and mobile
features.evidence_quote: consistently high quality video call experience, including in low bandwidth scenarios

features.name: postman collection
features.description: Postman collection for API exploration

features.name: figma ui kit
features.description: Figma UI kit for designing video call experiences

features.name: hybrid meetings
features.description: Hybrid in-person + remote meeting mode
features.evidence_quote: Whereby launches new Hybrid Meetings feature

features.name: developer community
features.description: Discord community for developers integrating Whereby

differentiators: GDPR + HIPAA compliant and ISO 27001 certified out of the box
Dual product model: Meetings (SaaS) + Embedded (API/SDK) on same infrastructure
Positioned as European alternative to Twilio, Zoom SDK, and Jitsi
Unrivaled support at no extra cost (dedicated Success team)
Reliable in low-bandwidth and mobile scenarios

recent_ships.source: Whereby launches new Hybrid Meetings feature (HN)

recent_ships.what: Docs last updated 3 months ago per GitBook footer

praised: 'Seeing 90% of our video calls rated 4 or 5 stars for quality shows us how Whereby has proven to be a dependable part of the telehealth experience' — Katrina Baxter-Moore, Sr PM
Reliable telehealth video quality (DrDoctor / NHS case study)
Trusted by leading telehealth platforms via API
complaints: No G2 review content accessible (page effectively empty in scrape) — sentiment signal weak
Changelog and Integrations pages 404 on public site — hard to verify recent ship cadence

free_tier.limits: free plan available; specific seat/usage caps not disclosed on pricing hub page

tiers.name: Meetings
tiers.headline_inclusions: Charged per user license; instant calls, permanent rooms, basic customization

tiers.name: Embedded
tiers.headline_inclusions: Charged by usage; API/SDK, programmatic rooms, extensive customization

pricing.notes: Two separate pricing models by product: Meetings is per-user-license, Embedded is usage-based. Detailed tier prices live behind product-specific pricing pages (/pricing/meetings, /pricing/embedded) which were not included in the scrape. Free plan referenced in FAQ.
